import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn parse_second(_ line: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut s1 = false
  while i < n and not s1
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        s1 = true
      end
    when None
      s1 = true
    end
  end
  mut s2 = false
  while i < n and not s2
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        s2 = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      s2 = true
    end
  end
  mut s3 = false
  while i < n and not s3
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        s3 = true
      end
    when None
      s3 = true
    end
  end
  let start = i
  mut s4 = false
  while i < n and not s4
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        s4 = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      s4 = true
    end
  end
  if start == i
    None
  else
    string.parse_int(string.substring(line, start, i))
  end
end

mut total = 0
mut cont = true
while cont
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    match parse_second(line)
    when Some(v)
      total = total + v
    when None
      total = total
    end
  when None
    cont = false
  end
end
print("sum=#{total}")
